hashtag_signals.caption: The Chill Guy meme coin, a Solana-based cryptocurrency inspired by a viral TikTok meme depicting a laid-back character, has rapidly gained popularity among Gen Z users. It surged from a $10 million to a $500 million market cap within days, with the token trading at approximately $0.3682.

hashtag_signals.caption: The Chill Guy Meme Coin experienced an extraordinary surge of 482,000%, driven by viral trends on TikTok. The platform's influence has significantly boosted meme coin popularity, with TikTok users actively promoting and sharing these tokens.
